backstory.original: Hailing from the Spine of the World, Bruenor is the leader of Clan Battlehammer. He is close friends with the celebrated drow Drizzt Do'Urden and the halfling Regis. Rounding out the 'Companions of the Hall' are his two adopted human children: Catti-Brie and Wulfgar.
backstory.display: 布鲁诺来自世界之脊，是战锤氏族的领袖，他与著名的卓尔精灵崔斯特·杜垩登以及半身人瑞吉斯是亲密好友。在“秘银五侠”中，还有他收养的两个人类孩子，凯蒂布莉儿和沃夫加。

description.original: Bruenor slashes at the closest enemy with his axe.
description.display: 布鲁诺用斧头劈砍距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Bruenor delivers a devastating blow to the closest enemy.
description.display: 布鲁诺对距离最近的敌人打出毁灭性的一击。

longDescription.original: Bruenor delivers a devastating blow to a single enemy using his shield and axe.
longDescription.display: 布鲁诺用他的盾牌和斧头对一名敌人打出毁灭性的一击。

description.desc: Increase the damage of $target by $amount% for each adjacent Champion
$target每与一名勇士同列，即提升 $amount% 伤害

tipText.original: Bruenor does more damage if he's adjacent to more Champions. Place him next to as many Champions as you can.
tipText.display: 相邻的勇士越多，布鲁诺造成的伤害越高。尽量将其放置在更多勇士身边。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Champions in the same column as $source by $(amount)%
与$source同列的勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害

tipText.original: Bruenor increases the damage of Champions in the same column as him. Place him in the same column as your most damaging Champions.
tipText.display: 布鲁诺使同纵队勇士的伤害提高。尽量将其与杀伤力最强的勇士放在同一纵队。

description.desc: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $amount% for 10 sec whenever a Champion within 2 slots of Bruenor is attacked (stacks up to 25 times)
当距离布鲁诺 2 格范围内的勇士被攻击时，在 10 秒内提升$(upgrade_name id)的效果 $amount%（最多可堆叠 25 层）

specializationDescription.original: Bruenor readies his shield, increasing the damage of those in the same column as him when nearby friends come under attack.
specializationDescription.display: 布鲁诺举起盾牌。当附近盟友受到攻击时，使同纵队勇士的伤害提高。

specializationDescription.original: Bruenor focuses on developing his group tactics, constantly increasing the damage of those in the same column as him.
specializationDescription.display: 布鲁诺专注于制定小队战术，不断提高同纵队勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $amount% for each Dwarf (other than $source_hero) in the formation
阵型中每有一位矮人（除$source_hero外），$(upgrade_name id)的效果即提升 $amount%
Your formation gains one Mithral Hall stack. Bruenor increases the effect of Rally by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Mithral Hall stack you have, stacking multiplicatively.
你的阵型获得一层秘银厅堆叠。每层秘银厅堆叠均使布鲁诺的“振奋”效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.stack_title: 布鲁诺秘银厅堆叠层数

description.original: Aye, a selfless dwarf I am.
description.display: 是的，我是个无私的矮人。

description.original: Well don't go gettin' all sappy on me.
description.display: 好了，不要再跟我废话了。

description.original: Get beside me. This is gonna be messy.
description.display: 到我身边来，马上要变得混乱了。
你可算会用脑子战斗了！

description.original: King 'er not, we need to rally these dwarves!
description.display: 不管是不是为了国王，我们得把这些矮人召集起来！

description.original: Did someone call fer Faerûn's strongest dwarf?
description.display: 有人自称是费伦最强壮的矮人？

description.original: What? I ain't wise enough for ye?
A few gnolls won't scare me!
description.display: 区区几个豺狼人吓不倒我！

description.original: Off yer rump and get back out there!
Stand yer ground! They can't defeat us together!
description.display: 守住阵线！他们无法击败团结的我们！

description.original: 'Tis an honor ta fight alongside ya.
description.display: 与你并肩作战是我的荣幸。

description.original: It's good to be the King!

character_sheet_details.backstory: Hailing from the Spine of the World, Bruenor is the leader of Clan Battlehammer. He is close friends with the celebrated drow Drizzt Do'Urden and the halfling Regis. Rounding out the 'Companions of the Hall' are his two adopted human children: Catti-Brie and Wulfgar.
布鲁诺来自世界之脊，是战锤氏族的领袖，他与著名的卓尔精灵崔斯特·杜垩登以及半身人瑞吉斯是亲密好友。在“秘银五侠”中，还有他收养的两个人类孩子，凯蒂布莉儿和沃夫加。

display.name: 盾牌大师
display.specialization_description: 布鲁诺举起盾牌。当附近盟友受到攻击时，使同纵队勇士的伤害提高。

original.specialization_description: Bruenor focuses on developing his group tactics, constantly increasing the damage of those in the same column as him.

display.specialization_description: 布鲁诺专注于制定小队战术，不断提高同纵队勇士的伤害。

original.description: Aye, a selfless dwarf I am.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 是的，我是个无私的矮人。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: Well don't go gettin' all sappy on me.

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 好了，不要再跟我废话了。

display.description: 你可算会用脑子战斗了！

original.name: Observant

original.name: Defensive Duelist

display.name: 防守型决斗者
display.description: 区区几个豺狼人吓不倒我！

original.name: Athlete
original.description: Did someone call fer Faerûn's strongest dwarf?

display.description: 有人自称是费伦最强壮的矮人？

original.name: King of Mithral Hall

display.description: 不管是不是为了国王，我们得把这些矮人召集起来！

original.name: To Your King!

display.description: 守住阵线！他们无法击败团结的我们！
